name: Bean and Rice Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the frozen onions and green peppers in a few tablespoons of water in a skillet until softened.
2. Drain and rinse the beans, then mash with a potato masher.
3. Add mashed beans, cooked rice, corn, spices, and water to the skillet. Stir occasionally until most of the liquid is absorbed (5-10 minutes).
4. Heat tortillas quickly in a preheated skillet, toaster oven, or microwave to soften them.
5. Spread a spoonful of bean mixture onto each tortilla.
6. Add salsa, lettuce, scallions, tomato, and any other desired toppings.
7. Fold the sides inward by about 1/2 inch, then roll tightly into burritos.
8. Serve immediately with additional salsa if desired. Leftover bean mixture can be stored in the refrigerator and reheated in the microwave before assembling more burritos.
